display.purpose: Page-level hero headings only. One per page. Bricolage Grotesque at maximum weight.

headline.purpose: Section titles and secondary page headings.

title.purpose: Card headings, nav section labels, modal titles.

body.purpose: Prose and description text. 65–75ch max line length.

label.purpose: Micro-typography system: chips, eyebrows, nav links, badges. ALL CAPS only.

shadows.name: panel-raised
shadows.purpose: Neo-panel cards at rest. Hard, no blur, structural.

shadows.name: button-raised
shadows.purpose: Primary and outline buttons at rest.

shadows.name: pressed
shadows.purpose: Hover/active state for raised surfaces, paired with translate(2px, 2px).

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus indicator. White inner ring ensures visibility on all backgrounds.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for color and opacity transitions (0.2s).

motion.name: ease-press
motion.purpose: Shadow collapse and translate on button press (0.1s). Linear feels mechanical and intentional.

motion.name: ease-entrance
motion.purpose: Ease-out-expo for scroll-reveal and page entrance animations (0.6–0.8s).

components.name: Button Primary
components.description: Primary CTA. Engineering Blue fill, press-in hover mechanic.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">View Selected Work <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #1169D4; color: #fff; border: 2px solid #242C38; border-radius: 0; height: 48px; padding: 0 32px; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 #242C38; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.1s linear, box-shadow 0.1s linear; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translate(2px, 2px); box-shadow: 2px 2px 0 #242C38; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #F2F5F8, 0 0 0 4px #1169D4; }

components.name: Button Outline
components.description: Secondary action. Background fill, same border and shadow system.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #F2F5F8; color: #161D27; border: 2px solid #242C38; border-radius: 0; height: 48px; padding: 0 32px; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 #242C38; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.1s linear, box-shadow 0.1s linear, background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #E6EBF0; transform: translate(2px, 2px); box-shadow: 2px 2px 0 #242C38; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #F2F5F8, 0 0 0 4px #1169D4; }

components.name: Button Ghost
components.description: Icon-only ghost button. No border at rest; hover fills to Cloud Surface.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost" aria-label="Toggle theme"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="5"/><path d="M12 1v2M12 21v2M4.22 4.22l1.42 1.42M18.36 18.36l1.42 1.42M1 12h2M21 12h2M4.22 19.78l1.42-1.42M18.36 5.64l1.42-1.42"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: transparent; color: #161D27; border: none; border-radius: 0; height: 40px; width: 40px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #E6EBF0; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #F2F5F8, 0 0 0 4px #1169D4; }

components.name: Neo-Panel Card
components.description: Primary content container. Hard border + 6px offset shadow. Never nested.
components.html:
Chargespot

EV Charging Platform featuring real-time station tracking, payment integration, and comprehensive charging analytics.

View project →
components.css: .ds-neo-panel { background: #FFFFFF; border: 2px solid #242C38; box-shadow: 6px 6px 0 #242C38; padding: 24px; border-radius: 0; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; color: #161D27; transition: transform 0.1s linear, box-shadow 0.1s linear; cursor: pointer; } .ds-neo-panel:hover { transform: translate(2px, 2px); box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 #242C38; } .ds-neo-panel h3 { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', 'Times New Roman', serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 20px; letter-spacing: -0.015em; line-height: 1.15; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-neo-panel p { font-size: 14px; color: #4F5A69; line-height: 1.7; margin: 0 0 16px; } .ds-neo-panel-cta { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #161D27; }

components.name: Neo-Chip Tag
components.description: Technology and category tags. Interface Glint background, hard border.
components.css: .ds-neo-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #C0ECF7; color: #161D27; border: 2px solid #242C38; border-radius: 0; padding: 4px 10px; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 9.6px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Eyebrow Label
components.description: Section category marker. Cloud Surface background. Maximum one per section.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #E6EBF0; color: #161D27; border: 2px solid #242C38; border-radius: 0; padding: 5px 10px; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10.4px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Square-cornered input. Focus ring in Engineering Blue.
components.css: .ds-input { display: flex; width: 100%; height: 40px; padding: 8px 12px; background: #F2F5F8; color: #161D27; border: 2px solid #242C38; border-radius: 0; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #4F5864; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #1169D4; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #1169D4; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Sticky header with uppercase tracked nav links and animated active indicator.
components.html:
Tarunitstarun.fyi
AboutProjectsContact
components.css: .ds-nav-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 32px; height: 64px; background: #F2F5F8; border-bottom: 2px solid #242C38; position: sticky; top: 0; } .ds-nav-logo { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-logo-name { font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #161D27; line-height: 1; } .ds-nav-logo-domain { font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #4F5864; line-height: 1; } .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; } .ds-nav-link { position: relative; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #4F5864; text-decoration: none; padding-bottom: 4px; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #161D27; } .ds-nav-link--active { color: #161D27; } .ds-nav-link--active::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -4px; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px; background: #161D27; }

narrative.overview:
This design system is built the way mobile software is built: every surface calibrated, nothing decorative, nothing that doesn't carry weight. The visual language borrows from technical drafting — hard borders, offset block shadows, a grid-overlay on the body, square corners everywhere — but it never tips into cosplay. The neo-brutalist vocabulary here is functional, not ironic.

The system is dual-mode, light and dark equally first-class, both driven from the same HSL token structure. The light mode rests on a cool blue-gray near-white — not a warm cream, not a beige parchment, not a "paper" background. The ink is near-black with a strong blue undertone, mirroring the primary palette rather than fighting it.

Framer Motion is the animation layer. Motion is applied surgically: hero entrance, project cards on scroll, mobile nav drawer, and a layoutId-anchored nav underline. No element is revealed by JavaScript if reduced motion is active.
keyCharacteristics: Square corners throughout (border-radius ≤ 0.125rem on interactive elements; 0 on cards and panels)
Offset block shadow: 4px × 4px on buttons, 6px × 6px on panels — same border-color, no blur
Press-in hover: shadow collapses to 2px × 2px while element translates 2px down-right
Uppercase tracked labels at 0.18–0.22em as the micro-typography system
Body background has a 48×48px grid overlay at 5% foreground opacity — structural texture, not decoration

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: Engineering Blue (#1169D4) is used on ≤5% of any screen surface. One primary CTA per viewport maximum. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Ink Consistency Rule
rules.body: Borders and offset shadows always use the same color: Graphite Authority (#242C38). Never mix border-color with a tinted or lighter tone.

rules.name: The Display Ceiling Rule
rules.body: No heading may exceed 4rem at any viewport. The clamp() max is the law.

rules.name: The Label System Rule
rules.body: Uppercase tracked labels appear on chips, eyebrows, nav links, and status tags only. Never on prose or multi-line content. One eyebrow per section maximum.

rules.name: The Hard Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows have zero blur, zero spread, and use Graphite Authority (#242C38) — the same value as the border. Any blur degrades the structural read.

rules.name: The Press Mechanic Rule
rules.body: Raised elements respond to hover by translating into their own shadow: translate(2px, 2px) + shadow reduction. The visual reads as a physical button being pressed.

dos: Do use Engineering Blue (#1169D4) exclusively for primary CTAs, focus rings, and active nav state.
Do use Graphite Authority (#242C38) as both the border color and the shadow color on every raised surface.
Do apply the press mechanic (translate(2px, 2px) + shadow 6→4px) to every interactive raised surface.
Do keep all border-radius at 0 for interactive and container elements.
Do pair Display headings with text-wrap: balance and cap them at clamp() max 4rem.
Do keep body prose at max 65–75ch line length.
Do test both light and dark themes for every new component — both are first-class.
Do provide a @media (prefers-reduced-motion) fallback for every animated element.
Do keep uppercase-tracked labels limited to categorical, non-prose contexts.
donts: Don't build what a generic developer resume site looks like: hero avatar, 3 skill cards, a contact form.
Don't use SaaS startup visual language: gradient blobs, warm cream backgrounds, social proof copy.
Don't use any warm-tinted background. Cool Structure (#F2F5F8) has a blue family tint — not cream, not beige.
Don't add blur-based glassmorphism effects. No backdrop-filter: blur() for decorative cards.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px) as accent elements on cards or list items.
Don't apply the hero-metric template as a standalone decorative section.
Don't apply eyebrows to every section — maximum one per section, used sparingly.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as scaffolding for non-sequential content.
Don't soften the shadows with blur or a lighter tone. 6px 6px 0 #242C38 is the specification.
